name: Stimm Voice
description: Real-time voice conversations powered by Stimm dual-agent architecture

docker.description: Run voice agent in Docker container

image.description: Docker image for the voice agent

model.description: Model name for the STT provider (e.g. nova-3, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe)

apiKey.description: API key for the STT provider. Falls back to STIMM_STT_API_KEY env, then to the provider-specific env var (e.g. DEEPGRAM_API_KEY).

model.description: Model name for the TTS provider (e.g. gpt-4o-mini-tts, eleven_turbo_v2_5, sonic-2)

voice.description: Voice selector. OpenAI: built-in voice name (e.g. ash). ElevenLabs: voice_id. Cartesia: voice UUID.

apiKey.description: API key for the TTS provider. Falls back to STIMM_TTS_API_KEY env, then to the provider-specific env var (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY).

llm.description: Fast LLM provider for the voice agent.

model.description: Model name for the LLM provider (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-sonnet-4-20250514, gemini-2.0-flash)

apiKey.description: API key for the LLM provider. Falls back to STIMM_LLM_API_KEY env, then to the provider-specific env var (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY).

spawn.description: Auto-spawn configuration for the Python voice agent process.

autoSpawn.description: Automatically start the Python voice agent when the gateway starts

pythonPath.description: Path to the Python executable (defaults to extension venv)

agentScript.description: Path to agent.py (defaults to extension python/agent.py)

maxRestarts.description: Max automatic restarts before giving up

enabled.description: Expose /voice web endpoint for browser voice sessions

access.description: Public web access and claim-token security for voice sessions.

mode.description: Access mode. 'none' = no public tunnel, 'quick-tunnel' = Cloudflare Quick Tunnel started on demand.

livekitTokenTtlSeconds.description: LiveKit token lifetime issued after claim exchange (seconds).

supervisorSecret.description: Optional shared secret required by POST /stimm/supervisor.

allowDirectWebSessionCreate.description: Allow direct POST /voice session creation without claim tokens (dev only).

claimRateLimitPerMinute.description: Maximum claim exchanges per IP per minute.

voiceAgent.stt.provider.label: STT Provider
voiceAgent.stt.provider.help: Speech-to-Text provider: deepgram, openai, google, azure, assemblyai, aws, speechmatics, clova, fal

voiceAgent.stt.model.label: STT Model
voiceAgent.stt.model.help: Model name for your STT provider (e.g. nova-3, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe)

voiceAgent.stt.apiKey.label: STT API Key
voiceAgent.stt.apiKey.help: API key for the STT provider. Falls back to STIMM_STT_API_KEY → provider env var.

voiceAgent.tts.provider.label: TTS Provider
voiceAgent.tts.provider.help: Text-to-Speech provider: openai, elevenlabs, cartesia, google, azure, aws, playai, rime, hume

voiceAgent.tts.voice.label: TTS Voice
voiceAgent.tts.voice.help: OpenAI: voice name (ash, alloy). ElevenLabs: voice_id. Cartesia: voice UUID.

voiceAgent.tts.apiKey.label: TTS API Key
voiceAgent.tts.apiKey.help: API key for the TTS provider. Falls back to STIMM_TTS_API_KEY → provider env var.

voiceAgent.llm.provider.label: LLM Provider
voiceAgent.llm.provider.help: Fast LLM provider: openai, anthropic, google, groq, azure, cerebras, fireworks, together, sambanova

voiceAgent.llm.apiKey.label: LLM API Key
voiceAgent.llm.apiKey.help: API key for the LLM provider. Falls back to STIMM_LLM_API_KEY → provider env var.

voiceAgent.docker.label: Run in Docker
voiceAgent.docker.help: Run the Python voice agent in a Docker container

voiceAgent.mode.label: Voice Agent Mode
voiceAgent.mode.help: autonomous: voice agent self-directs; relay: speaks supervisor text; hybrid: blends both

voiceAgent.spawn.autoSpawn.label: Auto-Start Agent
voiceAgent.spawn.autoSpawn.help: Automatically start the Python voice agent when the gateway starts

voiceAgent.spawn.pythonPath.label: Python Path
voiceAgent.spawn.pythonPath.help: Path to the Python executable. Leave empty to use the extension's venv.

access.mode.label: Access Mode
access.mode.help: 'none' for local-only, 'quick-tunnel' to create a Cloudflare Quick Tunnel on session start

access.claimRateLimitPerMinute.label: Claim Rate Limit
access.claimRateLimitPerMinute.help: Maximum claim exchanges per IP per minute.
